description: Equipment and tools for full-house residential deconstruction. Organized by ownership model (core fleet vs phase-specific vs consumable).

coreFleet.name: Crane
coreFleet.note: Already owned by ML Systems. Central to all structural phases — lifts roof sections, wall sections, floor sections, foundation panels.

coreFleet.name: Brokk 170 Demolition Robot
coreFleet.note: Replaces excavator + breaker crew + crusher + rebar cutter. Remote-operated. Primary in Phase 4, assists all phases. IS a robot — highest robot feasibility.

coreFleet.name: Spreader Bar + Rigging Kit
coreFleet.note: Used for every crane lift. Basket slings for roof, standard slings for walls/floors.

coreFleet.name: Skid Steer
coreFleet.note: Backfill, grading, material staging for heavy items

cutting.name: Oscillating Multi-Tool
cutting.note: Flush-cut nails to preserve sheet goods — THE decon preservation tool

cutting.name: Concrete Chain Saw (ICS/Husqvarna)
cutting.note: Foundation wall sectioning. Water-cooled diamond chain.

drilling.name: Cordless Impact Driver
drilling.note: Primary unfastening tool — screw removal across all phases

demolition.name: Cat's Paw / Nail Puller
demolition.note: Nail extraction where flush-cut not needed

safety_equipment.name: Magnetic Sweeper
safety_equipment.note: Nail collection after every phase + end of day. Also collects rebar fragments in Phase 4.

safety_equipment.name: Fall Protection Harness + Lanyard
safety_equipment.note: 100% tie-off required until roof is off

safety_equipment.name: Non-Contact Voltage Tester
safety_equipment.note: Verify dead circuits before electrical strip

material_handling.name: Wheelbarrow
material_handling.note: Shingle transport, debris, small material moves

material_handling.name: A-Frames
material_handling.note: Door and window display for BOH

rdEquipment.name: Track Breaker

v1.description: Motorized carriage + camera + RPi + fracture detection

rdEquipment.note: No commercial precedent. Patent scope identified. Solves Phase 4 bottleneck.

rdEquipment.name: Shingle Grinder (Morbark 950)
rdEquipment.note: Grinds shingles to RAS for HMA plants. Winter grinding (Nov–Mar) when asphalt is brittle. Scale threshold: 20+ homes for owned equipment.
